case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. SPORTS INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARDS; INDEX OF FEDEAL AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MEMO OF P&A INSUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARDS; DECLARATION OF NICOLE M. PHILLIPS RE: ATTORNEYS' FEES; NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARDS; MEMO OF P&A IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HARDWOOD FLOOR LAYERS LOCAL UNION NO. 1861 SERVED AUG-18-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT SPORTS INTERNATIONAL, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HARDWOOD FLOOR LAYERS LOCAL UNION NO. 1861 HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF HARDWOOD FLOOR LAYERS LOCAL UNION NO. 1861 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SPORTS INTERNATIONAL, INC. $68,935.32 PRINCIPAL, $1,571.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $70,871.57, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO SASE, COPY IN OUTBOX OF 301)
